case_title: TRINITY CAPITAL CORPORATION VS. 59TH & RACINE AUTO REPAIR SHOP, INC. DBA TRIPLE B et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS RETURNED FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY CAPITAL CORPORATION ON DEFENDANT 59TH & RACINE AUTO REPAIR SHOP, INC. DBA TRIPLE B AUTO REPAIR BILLINGS SR, EUGENE
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY CAPITAL CORPORATION SERVED JUN-17-2002, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BILLINGS SR, EUGENE

REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $194.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT 59TH & RACINE AUTO REPAIR SHOP, INC. DBA TRIPLE B AUTO REPAIR BILLINGS SR, EUGENE

CAUSE CALLED, THE COURT ORDERED THAT PLAINTIFF TRINITY CAPITAL CORPORATION HAVE AND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT 59TH & RACINE AUTO REPAIR SHOP, INC. DBA TRIPLE B AUTO REPAIR BILLINGS SR, EUGENE POSSESSION OF THE FOLLOWING DESCRIBED PROPERTY, TO WIT: SEE TEXT, OR IN CASE A DELIVERY OF SAID PROPERTY TO PLAINTIFF CANNOT BE HAD, THEN THAT THE PLAINTIFF HAVE AND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT $9,906.91 DAMAGES, $1,325.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $334.92 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $11,566.83, THE $334.92 (INCLUDES COST OF $194.00 & INTEREST OF $140.92) - THE VALUE OF THE PROPERTY IS $7,000.00 FOR LEASED EQUIPMENT OF ONE BLACK HAWK 2 TOWER FRAME MACHINE W/4 ANCHORING STANDS/SEE JUDGMENT AT LENGTH.
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF OCT-04-2002 IS OFF CALENDAR JUDGMENT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
